Project

Mobile Design System

A reusable design system for mobile products with a strong focus on consistency, performance, and team-wide adoption.

Published Nov 12, 2025

SwiftKotlinDesign TokensCI
GitHub Live Demo

This project consolidated UI components, design tokens, and interaction rules across multiple mobile surfaces. The result was a cleaner implementation path, fewer duplicated components, and easier product iteration.

Built with Astro. Adapt this template for your own portfolio or project showcase.
